buildCommand: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && pnpm install && pnpm --filter @workspace/tfo-pricing run build && mkdir -p artifacts/tfo-pricing/.vercel/output/static && cp -r artifacts/tfo-pricing/dist/. artifacts/tfo-pricing/.vercel/output/static/ && echo '{"version":3,"routes":[{"handle":"filesystem"},{"src":"/(.*)","dest":"/index.html"}]}' > artifacts/tfo-pricing/.vercel/output/config.json
